infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: NorthStar needs camera access to help you find objects and monitor your surroundings.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: NorthStar needs microphone access so you can ask for help using your voice.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: NorthStar uses speech recognition to understand your requests.

plugins.cameraPermission: NorthStar needs camera access to help you find objects.
